title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

subtitle.text: Descobrir de recèptas del torn del mond
subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

heroTitle.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

heroSubtitle.text: Navigar per de recèptas autenticas de cosinas del torn del mond
heroSubtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

featuredTitle.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

cookingTime.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

ramenName.description: Nom de la recepta Tonkotsu Ramen.

ramenDescription.text: Brou ric de òsses de porc amb chashu tendre, òu passat a l'aiga doça, e nòdas frescas.
ramenDescription.description: Descripción de la recepta Tonkotsu Ramen.

margheritaName.description: Nom de la recepta Piza Margherita.

margheritaDescription.text: Piza napolitana classica amb tomatas San Marzano, mozzarella fresca, e basilic.
margheritaDescription.description: Descripción de la recepta Piza Margherita.

tacosName.description: Nom de la recepta Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos de porc marinats amb pina, coriandre e cebas sus tortillas de milh.
tacosDescription.description: Descripción de la recepta Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenName.description: Nom de la recepta Pollastre al Burre.

butterChickenDescription.text: Pollastre tendre dins una salsa cremosa de tomata e burre amb espècias aromàticas.
butterChickenDescription.description: Descripción de la recepta Pollastre al Burre.

padThaiName.description: Nom de la recepta Pad Thai.

padThaiDescription.text: Nòdas de ris saltejadas amb camarons, tofù, cacahuètes e salsa de tamarind.
padThaiDescription.description: Descripción de la recepta Pad Thai.

crepesName.description: Nom de la recepta Crèpas Francesas.

crepesDescription.text: Crèpas finas e delicadas emplenadas amb Nutella, fragoletas frescas e crema batuda.
crepesDescription.description: Descripción de la recepta Crèpas Francesas.

label.description: Accessible label for the language switcher dropdown in the header.

en.description: English language option in the locale switcher.

ja.description: Japanese language option in the locale switcher.

es.description: Spanish language option in the locale switcher.
